_help: Inter-guild PvP circuit tournaments. Supported formats: single_elim, double_elim (winners/losers/grandFinal), round_robin (pools + optional playoffs), swiss. tier: 'major' or 'standard' — sets circuit points (see rules page). 'placements' automatically feed the guild PvP ranking. status: 'open' (registration), 'ongoing', 'finished'. Round labels are per-language objects (en/fr/de/es), e.g. {"en": "Semifinals", "fr": "Demi-finales", "matches": [...]}.
